widget.name: Pwb Customize Container Data View
widget.description: Premium DataView Container widget supporting nested custom Mendix widgets and fluent Drag and Drop sorting.

property.caption: Items Source
property.description: Dynamic list of child items to display and sort inside the container

property.caption: Custom Option Content
property.description: Render custom Mendix widgets for each list item

property.caption: Sorted IDs Attribute
property.description: Attribute on the parent context entity (e.g. String type) to store the comma-separated sorted IDs of the items.

property.caption: On Sort Complete Action
property.description: Microflow or nanoflow triggered immediately when drag-and-drop sorting completes

property.caption: Drag Handle Position
property.description: Choose whether to show the drag handle icon on the left, or hide it entirely.

property.caption: Accent Color (Hex)
property.description: Theme color for active drag outlines, markers, and glows (e.g., #3b82f6)

property.caption: Border Radius
property.description: Corner roundness of item rows and drop overlays (e.g., 16px, 8px, 0px)

property.caption: Enable Kanban Support
property.description: Turn on to allow dragging items across different widget instances (Kanban Column Mode)

property.caption: Drag Group Name
property.description: Match with other containers to allow dragging cards between them (e.g., 'project-kanban')

property.caption: Column Value
property.description: The value corresponding to this column/status (e.g., 'ToDo', 'InProgress')

property.caption: Item Column Attribute
property.description: The string or enumeration attribute on the item entity to update when card is dropped in this column

property.caption: Save Delay (ms)
property.description: Debounce saving to Mendix attribute and triggering actions. Set to 0 for instant saving.
